response: Data collection begins with defining the study's purpose to ensure data relevance and accuracy. Data sources are identified to gather data from reliable and accessible locations. Data is organized systematically to allow for data analysis that supports meaningful conclusions. Data entry processes are established to maintain data integrity and ensure data consistency. Data is reviewed for errors to improve data quality and enhance data reliability. Data analysis techniques are selected to transform raw data into interpretable data insights. Data interpretation involves examining data patterns to derive data driven conclusions. Data is then reported to communicate findings effectively while ensuring data confidentiality remains intact.
